title: vitis lanata var. rugosa
intro: Vitis lanata var. rugosa, also known as Chinese wild vine or wild grape, is a plant species in the Vitaceae family, characterized by its hairy, woody stems and small, white flowers. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Vitis lanata var. rugosa include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, such as bronchitis and pneumonia. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and its extracts are also used in modern medicine to create various pharmaceutical products.
